trivia_bullets.text: Kami of Jealous Thirst is a common Spirit from Modern Horizons 3 (released June 14, 2024). The flavor text places it explicitly in Towashi, the neon-lit megacity of Kamigawa: 'The bustle of life in Towashi opened up new avenues for less benevolent kami.' Towashi was introduced in Kamigawa: Neon Dynasty (February 2022), making this card a notable cross-set lore moment: a kami from Kamigawa's urban plane appearing as a named creature type in MH3, a non-Kamigawa set. [Scryfall]

In Kamigawa: Neon Dynasty lore, Towashi is the central megacity of a modernized Kamigawa where kami and mortals now coexist — though uneasily. When the city expanded into the Jukai Forest, displaced kami attacked workers; the emperor brokered a truce. 'For the most part, mortals and kami now live in harmony, but not everyone has adapted the same way to the changing plane.' The Kami of Jealous Thirst's flavor text — 'less benevolent kami' exploiting Towashi's bustling crowds — fits precisely this lore tension between the peace treaty and kami who refuse to be pacified. [Wizards Planeswalker's Guide to Kamigawa: Neon Dynasty; Tumblr vorthos: 'The Lore of Kamigawa: Neon Dynasty - Towashi']
sources: Wizards.com: Planeswalker's Guide to Kamigawa: Neon Dynasty
Tumblr: bacejelerenvorthos - Neon Dynasty Towashi lore

trivia_bullets.text: Mechanically, Kami of Jealous Thirst is a 1/3 Deathtouch Spirit for {2}{B}. Its activated ability ({4}{B}: each opponent loses 2 life, you gain 2 life — cost reduced to free if you've drawn 3+ cards this turn) is designed to reward high-draw strategies, which aligns it with blue-black shell decks. EDHREC rank is 19,086, indicating limited Commander adoption. Pauper legality makes it most relevant there. [Scryfall; EDHREC]
Full flavor text from Scryfall: 'The bustle of life in Towashi opened up new avenues for less benevolent kami.' No speaker attribution. [Scryfall]
